sections.paragraph:
m. שַׁלֶּטֶת f. (for שַׁלֵּטֶת, for ־ִי is lost in inflexion)-

(1) hard, vehement, i.q. سلِيطُ, and fem. שַׁלֶּטֶת Arabic سَلِيطَةُ an imperious and impudent woman, Eze 16:30.

(2) having power over anything, Ecc 8:8, and subst. powerful one, ruler, Ecc 7:19 10:5 Gen 42:6.

שליט

Chald.-

(1) powerful, Dan 2:10 4:23 having power over any thing, followed by בְּ of thing, Dan 4:14, 22 , 29 5:21 subst. a prince, Dan 2:15 5:29 Ezr 4:20.

(2) followed by לְ with an inf. (there is, there is given) power to do anything, Ezr 7:24.
